programmes.show_description: In Chinatown, No One Thinks About Forever: Shaken by the loss of Nellie's land, Ah Toy grapples with a hard choice. Mai Ling makes a deal with Eliza. (S3, ep 4 of 10)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 3)
Documentary series following one of the UK's largest police forces, Greater Manchester Police, as they tackle crime and battle to keep the streets safe.
Pokie Pass Out: A man has a welfare check in a busy car park, an evening drive becomes a sobering experience for one driver and a man struggles to correctly do a drugs test. (S12, ep 9)
Ice Man Cometh: Bystanders call out police to deal with an erratic driver, an unlicensed driver tries to push his luck and a man is fined on the way home from the store. (S12, ep 10)

A returning American is cuffed at the Peace Arch crossing in Washington and in Detroit, a German rock band rolls straight into secondary. (S1, ep 13)

In New York City, a laptop belonging to a Caribbean traveller does not compute and a young Brit arrives at Detroit Metro Airport to visit an American cyber pal. (S1, ep 16)

As the Zimbabwe and Zambia gangs negotiate predators as they forage on the river banks, the Victoria gang try to hide a new food source from baboons. (S1, ep 4)
